data.title: Rock Tech Lithium Announces Plans to Dual-List on NASDAQ and Filing of Short Form Base Shelf Prospectus
data.description: A company has submitted a preliminary short form base shelf prospectus and AIF as part of its progress towards a NASDAQ dual listing through the MJDS process. If approved, the final base shelf prospectus will be valid for 25 months, allowing the company flexibility in the capital markets. The submission was made in Toronto in April.

data.title: SiriusXM reportedly in talks to acquire iHeartMedia, potentially uniting two radio giants. Deal at early stages.
data.description: According to sources familiar with the negotiations, a merger is in the works to bring together two leading companies in the traditional and satellite radio industry.

data.title: Integrant announces closure of Series A capital raise. Now exploring pre-IPO raise ahead of November listing
data.description: Integrant, based in Sydney, has successfully completed its Series A funding round to further develop its AI platform. The company is now looking into a pre-IPO funding round as part of its preparation to list on the Nasdaq (INGT). This move is aimed at facilitating the company's expansion and growth as it progresses towards its planned IPO on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

data.title: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. Announces Consolidated Results for First Quarter 2026
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. and its subsidiaries (NYSE: CPAC; BVL: CPACASC1), a prominent cement company in Peru, reported its consolidated results for the first quarter of 2026 (1Q26). The financial data, prepared following International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) and denominated in Soles (S/), showed significant figures. In comparison to the first quarter of 2025 (1Q25), the company experienced notable developments.

data.title: TruTrade Removes the Need for Charts with Its Automated Trading Platform
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on April 24, 2026, TruTrade, a software firm focusing on automated trade execution, is experiencing increasing success with its innovative chartless trading method. The system is founded on a structured, rules-based platform. TruTrade's unique approach has garnered attention in the industry.

data.title: Statement from Robin Hood
data.description: In New York City, a nonprofit organization called Robin Hood has been dedicated to combating poverty for nearly four decades. The organization expresses gratitude to all its supporters, noting the significant contributions made by donor Ken Griffin over the years. Griffin's ongoing generosity has played a crucial role in improving the lives of numerous individuals in need throughout the city.

data.title: Wisconsin files suit against Coinbase, Kalshi, Robinhood for illegal sports betting, stirring state-federal tensions. (Read More)
data.description: Wisconsin is cracking down on companies like Coinbase and Kalshi for engaging in purportedly illegal sports betting through event contracts. This move signals an escalation in regulatory tensions between the state and federal authorities. The crackdown targets various companies and has brought attention to the issue of illegal sports betting. This action by authorities emphasizes the seriousness of the matter and highlights the specific companies, including Coinbase and Kalshi, that are allegedly involved in this illicit activity. The situation underscores the importance of complying with both state and federal laws to avoid facing similar regulatory actions.

data.title: Zcam app by Succinct fights AI deepfakes with cryptography - ensuring digital media authenticity against rising fraud.
data.description: Succinct's Zcam app utilizes cryptographic signatures to confirm the authenticity of digital media, combating increasing concerns about AI-driven fraud. This technology aims to enhance trust and security in the digital realm.

data.title: ALCA Celebrates Aging Life Care® Month with Free "Ask an Aging Life Care Manager®" Sessions in May
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, on April 24, 2026, the Aging Life Care Association® (ALCA) will be commemorating National Aging Life Care Month in May. They will be providing a special program for family caregivers, solo-agers, and individuals dealing with the challenges of aging. This initiative will take place on Fridays throughout the month and will offer valuable insights into managing aging-related issues.

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. Announces April Distribution
data.description: Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as the Manager of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX), recently disclosed the monthly distribution for the Fund's Shares in Toronto on April 24, 2026. This distribution indicates a positive financial outlook for shareholders holding the Fund's shares.

data.title: WALL FINANCIAL CORPORATION ANNOUNCES Q4 2026 FISCAL RESULTS
data.description: In Vancouver, BC, Wall Financial Corporation released its financial results for the year ending January 31, 2026, recording a net earnings and comprehensive income of $33,315,350 or $1.04 per share. This is an increase from the previous year's $27,405,502 or $0.85 per share. The decrease in revenue and income from rental apartment operations was due to a commercial tenant vacating the building for new construction. However, earnings from the company's hotels saw an increase attributed to lower operating costs. On the other hand, revenues and earnings from development operations declined due to fewer condominium unit sales in the current period. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: “The Great Connectivity” – How Masan Group Creates Value for Consumers, Partners, and Shareholders
data.description: In Vietnam, Masan recently introduced its cOS strategy during the 2026 Annual General Meeting. This strategic plan aims to integrate retail, brands, and digital aspects to enhance growth, efficiency, and consumer value in the market. This initiative underscores Masan's commitment to evolving and adapting to meet the needs of the Vietnamese market and consumers.

data.title: American officials have seized $344M worth of cryptocurrency tied to Iran, following Tether's freezing of $344M in USDt stablecoin.
data.description: Following a request from US law enforcement, Tether recently froze $344 million of its USDt stablecoin. This action was taken just one day before the announcement of a crypto freeze.

data.title: AAVE at $105 target with $80 support. Technicals show smart money backing, despite mixed signals; 35% chance of upside.
data.description: AAVE is currently at a pivotal turning point from a technical perspective, where data from derivatives suggest that institutional investors are positioning themselves for an upward trend, even though momentum indicators are currently neutral. Analysts at Blockchain.news have identified a 35% probability of a significant price increase.

data.title: LDO expected to reach $0.50 in 14 days as whales increase holdings. Smart money holds 58.7% long positions. Consolidating at $0.38.
data.description: Investors with strategic foresight are currently holding 58.7% of their positions in LDO derivatives as the token stabilizes at a price of $0.38. This indicates a potential upsurge in value to reach $0.50. Despite this, technical indicators that measure momentum are staying at a neutral level, suggesting a cautious approach to trading in the current market conditions.

data.title: Price prediction for HBAR: Expecting retest at $0.12 prior to potential rally to $0.15. Whales 65% long, indicators aligning for breakout. Key hurdle at 200-day MA ($0.12).
data.description: HBAR is currently trading at $0.09 with a significant 65% long position held by whales. Technical analysis indicates potential for a breakout. The key resistance level is the 200-day moving average at $0.12.

data.title: Dreame will unveil its latest wet dry vacuum innovations in Silicon Valley, building on rapid growth across the world
data.description: In San Francisco on April 24, 2026, Dreame will introduce its latest wet dry vacuum at the DREAME NEXT event in Silicon Valley on April 28 (PT). This unveiling will feature the brand's most recent innovations in technology and product offerings.

data.title: IFS announces filing of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Peruvian company Intercorp Financial Services Inc. (IFS) has recently disclosed its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. The entity, listed on the Lima Stock Exchange as well as NY Stock Exchange under the ticker symbols BVL/NYSE: IFS, made this announcement on April 24, 2026. The report includes crucial financial data and performance metrics for the stated period.
